title: Bug when executing INSERT SELECT with cte
description:
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
In ClickHouse 25.7.2.54, inserting into a table from a CTE fails with an UNKNOWN_TABLE error.
The same query works as expected in 25.5.5.19.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
25.7.2.54
### How to reproduce
Example:
```sql
create table test_insert (
`logged_at` DateTime64(6),
`id` String,
`is_pk` UInt8,
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{uuid}/{shard}', '{replica}')
ORDER BY tuple()
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;
```
Works:
```sql
insert into test_insert
select
now64(6),
'123',
1;
```
Fails in 25.7.2.54:
```sql
insert into test_insert
with cte_test as (
select
now64(6),
'1234',
1
)
select *
from cte_test
```
### Expected behavior
The CTE-based INSERT should succeed, producing the same result as the direct SELECT.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```
SQL Error [22000]: Code: 60. DB::Exception: Table example_db.cte_test does not exist. (UNKNOWN_TABLE) (version 25.7.2.54 (official build))
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_insert_1 (logged_at DATETIME, id TEXT, is_pk INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE test_insert_2 (logged_at DATETIME, id TEXT, is_pk INTEGER, value REAL);
CREATE TABLE test_insert_3 (logged_at DATETIME, id TEXT, is_pk INTEGER, nullable_value INTEGER);
key_bug_features: INSERT SELECT with CTE fails with UNKNOWN_TABLE error
